nodes.name: Macleay's honeyeater
nodes.summary: Macleay's honeyeater（Xanthotis macleayanus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Macleay's honeyeater。

nodes.name: Macleay's honeyeater
nodes.summary: Macleay's honeyeater (Xanthotis macleayanus) is a honeyeater endemic to Australia. Within Australia it has a limited distribution, occurring only in northern Queensland from Cooktown to the southern end of the Paluma Range. Its natural habitats are tropical dry forests and tropical moist lowland forests. References

nodes.name: Xanthotis
nodes.summary: Xanthotis（Xanthotis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Tawny-breasted honeyeater、Spotted honeyeater、Macleay's honeyeater。
